title_en: Movie Gen raises the bar for media world models
title_zh: Movie Gen 抬高媒体世界模型能力上限
description_en: Meta releases Movie Gen, showing stronger video generation, editing, personalization, and synchronized audio in a unified stack.
description_zh: Meta 发布 Movie Gen，在统一体系中展示了更强的视频生成、编辑、个性化与同步音频能力。
why_it_matters: It broadens the scope of world models from prediction and simulation to richer end-user media systems.
